Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Plaintiffs Service Of Process And Summons Of Complaint On The Grounds Of Invalid Service And Lack Of Jurisdiction
Off Calendar Sep-02-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Rebecca Epstein, Esq. (650-283-6328) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Hoyoung Huh.
Lucia MacDonald, Esq. (415-230-5395) for Defendants/Moving party RICHARD MANN and CHERYL MANN.
Court reporter: Ken Brill, CSR #12797, (415-274-9977), Reported. (501).

The Court announces the tentative ruling on the 2 motions. Both sides ARGUE. Plaintiff argues Lebel and service of process. Defendant argues no evidence of reasonable diligence and service of process. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS RICHARD MANN and CHERYL MANN Motion To Quash Plaintiffs Service Of Process And Summons Of Complaint On The Grounds Of Invalid Service And Lack Of Jurisdiction is taken under submission.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes)Both sides submit proposed orders. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Ken Brill, CSR #12797, (415-274-9977), Reported. (501).
